picks.excerpt: StoReel launched Canvas, an agent-powered AI production platform that turns a script into scene breakdowns, storyboards, character/setting references and optimized prompts for leading AI video models. The company claims it cuts production time by roughly two-thirds at about 15% of live-action cost.

Variety's recap of the record-breaking Annecy 2026 festival, where Hisko Hulsing's generative-AI short 'Danse Macabre' became the most-discussed film, drawing protest stickers, walkouts and booing as the industry wrestles with AI in animation.

The No Fakes Act, which would give individuals the right to authorize AI-generated replicas of their voice and likeness, cleared the Senate Judiciary Committee unanimously despite First Amendment concerns - a key development for how AI replicas can be used in film.
ByteDance's Seedance AI video model is reportedly getting a v2.5 update capable of generating 30-second clips, a notable jump in shot length for generative video used in filmmaking workflows.
